overview: My Concierge MD is a Beverly Hills concierge medicine practice led by Dr. David Nazarian, a board-certified internal medicine physician. The practice integrates traditional internal medicine with regenerative medicine and longevity science, offering personalized health optimization through extended appointments, direct physician access, and comprehensive preventive care.
highlights: House calls and hotel visits throughout Greater Los Angeles
targetAudience: Busy professionals, executives, and individuals seeking personalized preventive care and health optimization.
